description: Deterministic Python scripts that run via Linux cron (no LLM)

jobs.name: Sub-agent Completion Monitor (2min)
jobs.description: Monitors sub-agent completions and delivers notifications

jobs.name: Sub-agent Watchdog (5min)
jobs.description: Monitors sub-agent health and cleans up stuck sessions

jobs.name: OpenClaw Health Check (every 4h)
jobs.description: Health check for Gateway, ccproxy, disk space, memory, MC API

jobs.name: MC ↔ Todoist Sync
jobs.description: Two-way sync: pushes Mike's MC tasks to Todoist, pulls completions back

jobs.name: qmd-nightly-index
jobs.description: Nightly qmd update + embed to keep markdown search index fresh

jobs.name: Nightly Presentation Pipeline (download, evaluate, MC sync)
jobs.description: Downloads presentations, evaluates quality, syncs to Mission Control

jobs.name: Feed refresh (daily)
jobs.description: Fetch latest articles from all RSS feeds before morning brief

jobs.name: OpenClaw Local Backup (daily tar.gz)
jobs.description: Daily backup of OpenClaw workspace to tar.gz archive

jobs.name: Workspace Git Backup (daily push to GitHub)
jobs.description: Daily git commit and push of workspace changes to GitHub

jobs.name: OpenClaw Auto-Update (daily)
jobs.description: Daily check for OpenClaw updates, auto-install if available
